# Hofstadter-Butterfly Plotting (Track F.3)

Offline plotting helper for the Hofstadter-butterfly CSVs produced by
Huoma's `examples/hofstadter_butterfly.rs`. Same offline-execution
pattern as `external/itensor_ref/` and `external/hypertiling_ref/` —
Huoma's CI stays Rust-only; this just renders the committed CSVs.

## What is committed

| Path | What |
|---|---|
| `plot_butterfly.py` | matplotlib scatter renderer (CSV → PNG) |
| `README.md` | this file |

Not committed (gitignored): `.venv/`.

The CSVs and rendered PNGs live under `results/hofstadter/`, not here —
they are results, not reference data.

## Usage

```sh
cd external/hofstadter_ref
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install matplotlib

# Regenerate the CSVs (from repo root):
cargo run --release --example hofstadter_butterfly

# Plot:
.venv/bin/python plot_butterfly.py \
    ../../results/hofstadter/square_8x8.csv \
    ../../results/hofstadter/square_8x8.png \
    "Hofstadter butterfly: 8x8 square lattice"
```

## CSV schema

`flux,eigenvalue` — one row per (flux, eigenvalue) pair, all
eigenvalues at a given flux sharing that flux value. Generated by
`huoma::magnetic::butterfly_to_csv`.
